title: Call It a Day
writer: Casey Robinson, Dodie Smith, Sheridan Gibney
actors: Olivia de Havilland, Ian Hunter, Anita Louise
plot: The first day of spring has a profound affect on the Hilton family. The father, an accountant, finds himself unable to work, and when he tries to work, he is wooed by an actress whose taxes he is doing. The mother is mistaken by a...
